creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Thanks. The cadence for Mesa patch-level releases is ~2 weeks, for FreeBSD package bulk builds is 2 days (except Sunday). After bug 224513 lands, cementing 17.3.x series before 2018Q1 branches, MFH to 2018Q1 of the subsequent updates (e.g., 17.3.2) can be postponed by 1 week to bake on /head. Also, runtime regressions (e.g., crashes, broken init) on /quarterly can be fixed quickly under ports-secteam@ blanket if those don't require a port update with lots of unrelated changes.
